source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for precise English automation UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for pipeline states, dense dashboard tables, and multilingual operational forms.
layout: Flexible 8px grid, scale-pattern dividers, 8px component radius, curved automation paths, dark python navigation, and high-contrast pipeline status hierarchy.

prompts.label: Transparent python motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Python transparent motif cutout
Primary request: Create only a python snake scale motif cutout, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A coiled tropical forest python with accurate anatomy, glossy overlapping scales, gold brown and black scale patterning, subtle leaf-green natural reflections only in highlights, flexible sinuous posture, complete body visible with head included.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject; crisp silhouette suitable for background removal.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural scale detail and gold/brown/black markings.
Transparent workflow: place the python on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no leaves, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Python light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board derived from a python snake cutout and its gold brown black scale pattern.
Reference use: Use the python motif as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, flexible curves, and automation-system interaction language from python scales. The board must visibly respect gold brown black patterning with restrained leaf green tropical forest accents.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, intended final asset 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, crisp UI text, and avoid dense tiny text.
Title text: "Morphous Python". Subtitle text: "Flexible automation system".
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
UI coverage: sidebar navigation, top command bar, pipeline dashboard, automation run status cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, data table, form inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, empty/loading/error states, buttons, tool icons.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose Geist plus Noto Sans JP style guidance for multilingual product UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, compact operational dashboard feel, 8px card radius, scale-pattern dividers, curved automation paths.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: warm ivory background, gold ochre primary, dark python black ink, scale brown surfaces, deep cocoa borders, leaf green accent.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs; no fake logos or random brand names.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible microtext, no cropped board.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Python dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Python design-system board. It must feel like the same flexible automation system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the python motif and the light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, python scale texture, flexible curved automation language, compact spacing, and typography.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, intended final asset 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, crisp UI text, and avoid dense tiny text.
Title text: "Morphous Python". Include label "Dark Mode" and subtitle "Flexible automation system".
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
UI coverage: dark sidebar navigation, top command bar, pipeline dashboard, automation run status cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, data table, form inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, empty/loading/error states, buttons, tool icons.
Visual details: dark background derived from python black and deep cocoa, readable warm ivory text, gold ochre primary controls, scale brown surfaces, subtle python-scale pattern overlays, restrained leaf green forest accents for success and active states, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose Geist plus Noto Sans JP style guidance for multilingual product UI.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no paragraphs; no fake logos or random brand names.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no illegible text, no watermark, no random brand names, no cropped board.
